settings.title: What That Orange Dashboard Light Really Means
settings.excerpt: Not every warning light is an emergency, but one of them genuinely is, and people often pick the wrong one to ignore.
settings.body:
We get a lot of cars in with a light on the dash and a driver who has been ignoring it for weeks. Here is the short version of what to do.

A flashing engine light means stop soon. Steady orange usually means book it in this week. Flashing means a misfire that can wreck your catalytic converter if you keep driving.

The oil pressure light, the red one shaped like a can, means pull over and switch off now. Running an engine with no oil pressure can end it in minutes.

Tyre pressure and washer-fluid lights are not emergencies, but the engine and oil lights are not worth a gamble. When in doubt, ring us and describe the colour and whether it flashes.
